test.notes: 4 test failures, all in missionsFix WIP code (not memory-hardening). Memory-hardening-specific tests: 55/55 pass (38 memory service tests + 17 MemoryHealthTab UI tests).

typecheck.notes: 2 errors: batchConsolidationService redeclared in main.ts. This is from uncommitted WIP changes to main.ts on missionsFix branch, not from committed memory-hardening code.

reviewsSummary.notes: No feature reviews spawned — validators failed, halting per skill procedure.

blockingIssues.description: Typecheck failure: batchConsolidationService declared twice in main.ts (lines 842 and 858). The working tree WIP changes to main.ts added a batchConsolidationServiceRef approach with a new batchConsolidationService const, but the OLD const (committed in d19ec00) was not removed. Fix: remove the second duplicate const batchConsolidationService declaration (lines 858-867 in the current working tree), keeping only the first one that sets batchConsolidationServiceRef.
blockingIssues.errorMessage: error TS2451: Cannot redeclare block-scoped variable 'batchConsolidationService'.

blockingIssues.description: Test failures in missionService.test.ts (2 failures): 'no such column: m.archived_at'. The WIP missionService.ts changes add archived_at references to the missions table queries but kvDb.ts does not have an archived_at column in the missions table CREATE statement. Not related to memory-hardening features. This is from the user's active missionsFix branch work.

Test failures in orchestratorService.test.ts (1 failure) and aiOrchestratorService.test.ts (1 failure). These are from the user's active missionsFix branch WIP — orchestrator code is listed as off-limits for memory-hardening workers. The mission.md notes known pre-existing issues in orchestrator tests.

analysisNote: IMPORTANT: All memory-hardening feature tests pass cleanly. The 4 test failures and 2 typecheck errors are from the user's UNCOMMITTED WIP changes to the missionsFix branch (missionService.ts and main.ts), NOT from the committed memory-hardening features (commits e80bf92 through b58ddeb). Running tests scoped to memory services and MemoryHealthTab gives 55/55 passing. The orchestrator recommends validating the committed memory-hardening features directly by stashing or checking out the committed state.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a note that when the missionsFix branch has uncommitted WIP changes, scrutiny validators should document whether failing tests come from the milestone under review or from pre-existing WIP changes, and should run milestone-scoped tests in addition to the full suite.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The memory-hardening scrutiny validation found 4 test failures and 2 typecheck errors, all from the user's uncommitted missionsFix WIP (missionService.ts archived_at migration gap, main.ts duplicate batchConsolidationService), not from memory-hardening features. All 55 memory-hardening tests pass.
